title: Fantasy Tools
description:
A very very normal resource pack that retextured armor, tools, mobs, and a few blocks.

Available for both MCPE/Bedrock and Java!

Shall not read files.
body:
This is a pack I made for someone who can't be named, you can use it if you want. This is a fantasy texture pack. This is my first texture pack, I took inspiration from better netherite default texture pack and Minecraft dungeon tools texture pack.

Thank you to [NotroDan](https://www.youtube.com/@NotroDan) for making the map. 

>"Xlmw ibtivmqirx ampp fi kmzir xs xli asvph. -Wli wemh"
My apologies, I smashed my keyboard.

I made this in 2021 it was originally for Bedrock Edition, but I decided to port it to Java too. The splash screens in the Java edition are the same text as the loading screen text in the Bedrock edition.
The texture pack is not much, I will try to expand on it more. :)
